patches.title: Enable Legacy UI
patches.description: [This patch will stop working soon] - Replaces the New Compose based UI with the Legacy UI (disables player-market-ui feature flag)

patches.title: Radiant Lyrics API - WIP
patches.description: Use Radiant Lyrics API to fetch Lyrics (Higher quality & More providers)

patches.title: Player Backdrop
patches.description: Restores the legacy translucent backdrop blur behind the player

advancedOptions.title: Blur Strength
advancedOptions.description: How strongly the album art behind the player is blurred

advancedOptions.title: Backdrop Dimming
advancedOptions.description: Darkens the backdrop so the foreground controls stay legible

advancedOptions.title: Cover Everywhere - WIP
advancedOptions.description: Applies the blurred backdrop to every Compose based page (Home & Collection)

patches.title: Quality Badge Colors
patches.description: Brings color back to the player quality badge.

patches.title: One-Handed Mode
patches.description: Mirrors the bottom player buttons left-to-right for easier one-handed reach.

patches.title: Lyrics Progress Pill
patches.description: Restores the old Track Progress Pill in the top of the Lyrics screen!

patches.title: Disable Lyrics Cover
patches.description: Removes the mini track cover from the lyrics screen.

patches.title: Replace Lyrics Button
patches.description: Replaces the Lyrics button with the RL Sparkle!

patches.title: Replace Share Button
patches.description: Replaces the share button with the Tidal Connect button from the top of the screen. (it's in the menu already)

patches.title: Redesigned Mini-Player
patches.description: Integrates the Seekbar into the control panel at the bottom of the screen.

advancedOptions.title: Mini-Player Dynamic Background
advancedOptions.description: Colorizes the Mini-Player depending on the currently playing track.

advancedOptions.title: Progress Border
advancedOptions.description: Draws an animated progress ring around the floating mini-player. Requires the Floating style.

advancedOptions.title: Mini-Player Gestures
advancedOptions.description: Adds swipe up gesture to the mini-player to reopen the player

advancedOptions.title: Next/Previous Gestures
advancedOptions.description: Swipe left or right on the mini-player to skip tracks.

patches.title: Keep Controls Visible
patches.description: Inverts the auto-hide behavior on the lyrics screen, playback controls stay visible by default and only hide when you tap them off.

patches.title: Waze Integration
patches.description: Control TIDAL playback from the Waze app

patches.title: Unlock Debug Menu
patches.description: Reveals TIDAL's hidden Debug Menu in Settings. (Unlocks Feature Flags & the legacy Debug Options)
